titleStmt.title: SII 36.289: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 289. (A.R. No. 289 of 1910.) TIRUVAḌANDAI, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Tiruvālīśvara temple.

summary.p: The Dāsar and Tāṉattār, the managers of the Kētāyuthaṉār appointed five women servants (cēvikkum peṇḍukaḷ) for doing temple service in the temple of Vittūr Uḍaiyār. They were provided with houses, some lands and certain privileges in the temple food for their services.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vekutāṉiya varuṣam cittirai mātam 10 2 śrī mat ketāyutāṉar kāriyattukkukaṭavar tācarum tāṉattārum vittūr Uṭaiyārk koyil cevikkum peṇkaḷukku kalveṭṭu pūṟuvam cevikku peṇkaḷillāta paṭiyā
le varatarācar putucāka viṭuvitta Akkanāyaṉ makaḷ Appanācciku caṉṉati teruvil teṉciṟakil kīḻai Iraṇṭumaṉai viṭṭu mūṉṟām maṉaiyum Ivaḷ taṅkai Aṟamaḷatta nāccikku melaimaṉaiyum Aḻakiyar makaḷ Eṟamanaccikku
Itil melai maṉaiyum kampar makaḷ Aḻakiya nāccikku vaṭa ciṟakil mūṉṟāmaṉaiyum veḷḷantāṅkiṉā makaḷ poṉṉāku kīḻai maṉaiyum ki kīḻpātiri pu nūṟṟu Irupatu kuḻiyum niṉṟap peṟ perile nūṟu kuḻiyum koyile nāḻi coṟum cantirādhi
ttavaraiyum Immatikā peṟṟu koyil cevukum kā cevittu naṭattak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Itaṉ cukattile Iruk
Digital edition of SII 36.289 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
